message:
feat(fnp-python): add numpy.partition + argpartition + fromfile wrappers (br-franken_numpy-9vzr, br-franken_numpy-b2hx, br-franken_numpy-5wra)

Expose fnp_python.partition / argpartition / fromfile delegating to
the matching numpy functions.

partition + argpartition parity covers:
- 1-D partition with scalar kth (k-th element in sorted position)
- 2-D axis=1 partition with per-row k-th parity
- array-valued kth [2, 5] with all listed indices in sorted position
- argpartition indices select the same value at the k-th position

fromfile parity covers:
- binary read of int32 data from a temp file path (full + count-limited
  + nonzero offset)
- text mode with sep=' ' reading float64 ASCII tokens

Temp files created via tempfile.mkstemp + builtins.open, deleted after
each sub-scenario so the test remains isolated.
